prompt: The facade of a [brutalist or concrete building] — [lens] locked directly facing the facade, the building's [defining brutalist feature] filling two-thirds of the frame, [light quality] raking across the raw concrete surface to reveal its [surface texture]: board marks, aggregate, staining, [weathering detail] accumulated over the building's life, [human scale element] in the lower third establishing the building's true scale, the sky at the top edge, cinematic brutalist architecture still, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
